parameters.subject: Your Utopia Deli order – payment link
parameters.text:
=Hey {{$json.customer_name}},
Your order total is ${{$json.total/100}}.
Pay securely here: {{$json.payment_link_url}}
We’ll start cooking as soon as payment clears.
— The Utopia Deli

parameters.subject: We’re closed – your order will be processed at opening
parameters.text: =Thanks {{$json.customer_name}}! We’re currently closed; your order will be queued and you’ll receive a payment link when we open at {{$env.HOURS_OPEN || '09:00'}} CT.
